title: onosma khorassanica
intro: Onosma khorassanica, also known as Persian goldenseal or Iranian goldenseal, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Iran and Afghanistan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of berberine, a compound with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Onosma khorassanica include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and exhibit antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Onosma khorassanica can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
